name: color-matcher
description: Color match and white balance fixes for images

fix_white_balance.description: Apply automatic white balance to input image (before color transfer)
fix_white_balance.title: Fix White Balance

method.description: The method to use for color transfer
method.title: method

reference_image.description: The reference image. If not provided, only white balance fixes will be applied.
reference_image.title: Reference Image

strength.description: Strength of the color transfer effect (0.0 to 1.0)
strength.title: Strength

white_balance_percentile.description: Percentile for white balance calculation (0.0 to 100.0)
white_balance_percentile.title: White Balance Percentile
